preliminary_oral_examination.requirement: Required by Graduate College; rigorously tests knowledge of major, minor, and supporting subject areas.

scheduling_rules.request_submission: At least two weeks before proposed date
scheduling_rules.academic_plan_approval: Must be approved 3 months prior to exam date (effective Jan 1, 2021)
scheduling_rules.gap_before_final_exam: Minimum of six months must elapse between passing prelim and taking final oral exam
scheduling_rules.registration: If taken between terms, registration can be for either the term before or after

preliminary_oral_examination.instructions_location: Workday Student: Request a Graduate Oral Exam

dissertation.preparation: Must be prepared according to Graduate College requirements.

final_oral_examination.nature: Generally a defense of the dissertation; questions on coursework/concentration areas possible.
final_oral_examination.committee_requirement: All members must be present throughout the entire scheduled period.

timeline.dissertation_distribution: At least two weeks prior to exam
timeline.request_submission: At least three weeks prior to intended date

logistics.scheduling: Student arranges meeting time/place in agreement with committee
logistics.reporting: Graduate College uses electronic process; committee receives email link to online form

final_oral_examination.instructions_location: Workday Student: Request a Graduate Oral Exam

process: Non-confidential answers sent to major professor/advisor for sign-off
Confidential answers stay with HCI DOGE

residency_requirement.general_expectation: Expected to be a resident at Iowa State University in Ames, Iowa.
residency_requirement.exceptions: Must be discussed with HCI Supervisory Committee.

credit_requirements.on_campus_minimum: At least 36 credits must be enrolled as full-time, on campus student
credit_requirements.dissertation_research: All research credits must be earned from ISU under committee supervision
